description: Vertical color photograph (no on-image text or graphic design) of a Pembroke Welsh Corgi standing in a field of orange and yellow wildflowers (California poppies and similar blooms) at golden hour. The dog is tan, red and white, with its tongue out and mouth open toward the camera, wearing a harness with a black leash extending to the upper right. The background shows a utility pole, scattered bare trees, distant houses and a sunset sky. It accompanies a social-media post introducing 'Murphy von Peanut,' the corgi of a DOL Office of the Solicitor litigator named Rose. No agency seal, slogan, or designed typography appears on the image itself.
notable_text: (none on image; tweet text only -- introduces 'Murphy von Peanut, corgi extraordinaire')
